context: Evaluates whether the agent implements a correct Terraform plan validation policy in Rego for aws_security_group resources, using the canonical terraform.analysis package, normalizing input with object.get, checking both create and update actions, and denying security groups that allow inbound SSH (port 22) from the internet.

checklist.name: package terraform.analysis
checklist.description: The policy uses `package terraform.analysis` (the canonical package for OPA Terraform plan validation)

checklist.name: object.get input normalization
checklist.description: The policy normalizes the plan input with `object.get(input, "plan", input)` to support both raw Terraform and HCP Terraform input structures

checklist.name: Checks create and update actions
checklist.description: The deny rules check for both `create` and `update` actions in `r.change.actions`, not just `create`

checklist.name: Filters aws_security_group resources
checklist.description: The deny rule filters on `r.type == "aws_security_group"` before checking ingress rules

checklist.name: Deny rule for SSH from internet
checklist.description: A deny rule triggers when an ingress rule allows port 22 with cidr 0.0.0.0/0 (or ::/0)

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v` (if tests are present)
